conditions: component reused at multiple container widths

findings.summary: No dark-mode adaptation: the surface ignores prefers-color-scheme: dark.
findings.evidence: Under emulated prefers-color-scheme: dark, .ndm-card background is rgb(255, 255, 255) (computed color-scheme: "light dark") with no color-scheme: dark declared, so it stays a light surface.
findings.suggestedFix: Declare color-scheme: light dark and use light-dark() (or a prefers-color-scheme: dark block) for surface and text colors so the card follows the user preference. See Modern Web Guidance id dark-mode.

findings.summary: Animation keeps running under prefers-reduced-motion: reduce.
findings.evidence: Under emulated prefers-reduced-motion: reduce, .mv-card still has 1 running animation(s) (animation-name "mv-slide", duration 0.8s).
findings.suggestedFix: Gate the animation behind @media (prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference) so it only runs when the user has not requested reduced motion.

findings.summary: Horizontal overflow at a narrow mobile viewport.
findings.evidence: At 360px viewport, document scrollWidth 1518px exceeds innerWidth 1440px. Viewport meta present.
findings.suggestedFix: Replace fixed pixel widths with width: 100%; max-width: <n> and box-sizing: border-box so the layout adapts down to small screens. Ensure a meta viewport is present.

findings.summary: Focus outline removed with no :focus-visible replacement.
findings.evidence: .pf-btn sets outline: none and no :focus-visible rule restores an outline; when focused the computed outline is none / 3px, leaving keyboard users with no visible focus indicator.
findings.suggestedFix: Remove the blanket outline: none and add a .pf-btn:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid <color>; outline-offset: 2px } rule so keyboard focus is clearly indicated without affecting pointer clicks.

findings.summary: Cumulative layout shift from late content with no reserved space.
findings.evidence: Observed layout-shift score 0.012 after load (.ls-slot reserves 0px), as the late-injected banner pushes following content down.
findings.suggestedFix: Reserve the banner space up front with min-height (or aspect-ratio) on the slot so the late content does not shift surrounding layout.

findings.summary: Reused component does not adapt to its container (no container queries).
findings.evidence: The same .cq-card stays flex-direction: row inside the 240px .cq-narrow container; no @container rule or container-type is declared, so the component responds only to the viewport, not its own width.
findings.suggestedFix: Add container-type: inline-size to the wrapper and a @container (max-width: 320px) rule that stacks the card, so the component adapts to its container rather than the viewport.

taskList.title: No dark-mode adaptation: the surface ignores prefers-color-scheme: dark.
Animation keeps running under prefers-reduced-motion: reduce.
Horizontal overflow at a narrow mobile viewport.
Focus outline removed with no :focus-visible replacement.
Cumulative layout shift from late content with no reserved space.
Reused component does not adapt to its container (no container queries).
